meta.title: Expert Orthopedic Surgeon in Rehovot & Rishon LeZion – Shoulder & Knee
meta.description: Dr. Vyacheslav Dubenko, orthopedic specialist and shoulder & knee surgeon with 37 years of experience. Clinics in Rehovot, Bnei Ayish and Rishon LeZion, affiliated with Maccabi. Book an appointment: 08-9560938.

hero.subtitle: Diagnosis and treatment of joint, tendon and bone problems — from conservative care to arthroscopic surgery — at four clinics in Rehovot, Bnei Ayish and Rishon LeZion.

intro.title: Conservative treatment first, surgery only when truly needed
intro.p1: Dr. Dubenko has been caring for patients with joint pain and orthopedic injuries for 37 years. Every case is first explored along the conservative path — medication, injections and rehabilitation — and surgery is considered only once those options have been exhausted.
intro.p2: When surgery is needed, he favors minimally invasive arthroscopic techniques: smaller incisions, less pain and a faster recovery.
intro.imageAlt: Orthopedic consultation with a patient at the clinic

services.title: What we treat
services.subtitle: Diagnosis, treatment and surgery for all the major joints — from the shoulder down to the foot.

shoulderElbow.description: Treatment of shoulder pain, tendon tears, impingement syndromes and elbow problems.

knee.description: Diagnosis and treatment of meniscus injuries, ligament tears and cartilage wear.

ankleFoot.description: Care for ankle injuries, tendon inflammation and foot pain.

jointInjections.description: Steroid and hyaluronic acid injections to relieve pain and inflammation.

arthroscopy.description: Minimally invasive procedures to diagnose and repair joint damage.

experience.description: Rich clinical and surgical experience diagnosing and treating a wide range of orthopedic conditions.

surgical.title: Shoulder & knee surgeon
surgical.description: Focused surgical expertise in the body's two most complex, hardest-working joints.

arthroscopy.title: Minimally invasive approach
arthroscopy.description: A preference for arthroscopic surgery — small incisions, less pain, faster recovery.

languages.title: Care in three languages
languages.description: Full consultation and follow-up in Hebrew, Russian and English — nothing gets lost in translation.

appointment.title: Scheduling a visit is easy
appointment.text: Leave your details in the form and we will get back to you shortly to schedule a visit at the clinic most convenient for you. Or, of course, simply give us a call:

clinics.title: Four clinics in central Israel
clinics.subtitle: Rehovot, Bnei Ayish and Rishon LeZion — choose the branch that suits you best.

cta.subtitle: The clinic team will be glad to help you schedule an appointment and answer any question — affiliated with the Maccabi health fund.
